response:
<<AI Rules And Ethics>>
Section 1
Microsoft states clear rules.
These rules guide code.
Code must stay safe.
Safety helps all users.
Users trust the firm.
Trust builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect people well.
Well designed tools work.
Work requires honest care.
Care prevents bad harm.
Harm hurts many lives.
Lives deserve full respect.
Respect means fair play.
Play follows strict laws.
Laws stop wrong acts.
Acts need good intent.
Intent drives smart choices.
Choices shape future paths.
Paths lead to growth.
Growth benefits whole society.
Section 2
Artificial intelligence needs checks.
Checks ensure fair results.
Results should not bias.
Bias hurts some groups.
Groups need equal rights.
Rights are basic needs.
Needs must get met.
Met goals build hope.
Hope inspires new ideas.
Ideas create better tools.
Tools help daily tasks.
Tasks become much easier.
Easier work saves time.
Time allows more fun.
Fun brings joy home.
Home feels warm and safe.
Safe spaces foster peace.
Peace lets minds rest.
Rest recharges tired brains.
Brains solve hard problems.
Section 3
Privacy remains a key.
Key protects private data.
Data belongs to you.
You own your info.
Info stays under lock.
Lock keeps secrets safe.
Safe storage stops leaks.
Leaks can ruin lives.
Lives need strong guards.
Guards watch every step.
Step by step care.
Care prevents data theft.
Theft steals personal trust.
Trust breaks when lost.
Lost trust is hard.
Hard to fix again.
Again we must try.
Try to build back.
Back to safe ways.
Ways that honor rights.
Section 4
Transparency shows how things.
Things work inside systems.
Systems reveal their logic.
Logic helps users understand.
Understand means no fear.
Fear stops people acting.
Acting needs clear facts.
Facts show true truth.
Truth guides right paths.
Paths avoid hidden traps.
Traps catch unaware folks.
Folks need full warning.
Warning comes before use.
Use requires informed consent.
Consent means saying yes.
Yes gives clear power.
Power belongs to users.
Users control their data
